name: engineering-workflow
description: Personal engineering workflow skills for Codex: operating defaults, alignment gate, agent dispatch, TDD, systematic debugging, design alternatives, subagent review, and compounded learnings.

interface.shortDescription: Codex operating defaults, alignment, dispatch, TDD, debugging, design alternatives, review, and learning capture.
interface.longDescription: A personal engineering workflow plugin that packages reusable Codex skills for correctness-first development: an alignment gate before non-trivial edits, observable triggers for dispatching subagents, test-driven behavior changes, systematic debugging, parallel design-space exploration, subagent review, and durable session learning capture.
defaultPrompt: Use engineering workflow for this task.
Explore design alternatives for this interface.
Compound durable learnings from this session.
